_comment: LIST prices in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. These are EDITABLE defaults and may not match current Anthropic pricing for every model — verify against https://www.anthropic.com/pricing and edit. Matched by model-id prefix (longest match wins). 'actualCostMultiplier' scales list->actual: 0 means you pay per-token nothing at the margin (Claude Max/Pro subscription), 1 means you pay full API list price.
